meaning: adj.便衣(尤指不穿制服的警察)的
examples: He was arrested by plainclothes detectives as he walked through the customs hall.
Riot police and plainclothes security men have ringed universities.
Even clergymen visiting the area had to be accompanied by plainclothes policemen.
Excerpt: When I was promoted to detective second grade and was working plainclothes, my problems began.
Security in Jordan's camps is less visible, though plainclothes police keep a watchful presence.
